name: The Fool
effect: Creates a copy of the last Tarot or Planet card used

name: The Magician
effect: Enhances 2 selected cards to Lucky Cards

name: The High Priestess
effect: Creates up to 2 random Planet cards

name: The Empress
effect: Enhances 2 selected cards to Mult Cards

name: The Emperor
effect: Creates up to 2 random Tarot cards

name: The Hierophant
effect: Enhances 2 selected cards to Bonus Cards

name: The Lovers
effect: Enhances 1 selected card into a Wild Card

name: The Chariot
effect: Enhances 1 selected card into a Steel Card

name: Justice
effect: Enhances 1 selected card into a Glass Card

name: The Hermit
effect: Doubles money (max of $20)

name: The Wheel of Fortune
effect: 1 in 4 chance to add Foil, Holographic, or Polychrome edition to a random Joker

name: Strength
effect: Increases rank of up to 2 selected cards by 1

name: The Hanged Man
effect: Destroys up to 2 selected cards

name: Death
effect: Converts the left selected card into the right one

name: Temperance
effect: Gives the total sell value of all current Jokers (max of $50)

name: The Devil
effect: Enhances 1 selected card into a Gold Card

name: The Tower
effect: Enhances 1 selected card into a Stone Card

name: The Star
effect: Converts up to 3 selected cards to Diamonds

name: The Moon
effect: Converts up to 3 selected cards to Clubs

name: The Sun
effect: Converts up to 3 selected cards to Hearts

name: Judgement
effect: Creates a random Joker

name: The World
effect: Converts up to 3 selected cards to Spades

name: Pluto
effect: +1 level to High Card

name: Mercury
effect: +1 level to Pair

name: Uranus
effect: +1 level to Two Pair

name: Venus
effect: +1 level to Three of a Kind

name: Saturn
effect: +1 level to Straight

name: Jupiter
effect: +1 level to Flush

name: Earth
effect: +1 level to Full House

name: Mars
effect: +1 level to Four of a Kind

name: Neptune
effect: +1 level to Straight Flush

name: Planet X
effect: +1 level to Five of a Kind

name: Ceres
effect: +1 level to Flush House

name: Eris
effect: +1 level to Flush Five

name: Familiar
effect: Destroy 1 random card in hand, add 3 random enhanced face cards

name: Grim
effect: Destroy 1 random card in hand, add 2 random enhanced Aces

name: Incantation
effect: Destroy 1 random card in hand, add 4 random enhanced numbered cards

name: Talisman
effect: Add a Gold Seal to 1 selected card

name: Aura
effect: Add Foil, Holographic, or Polychrome to 1 selected card in hand

name: Wraith
effect: Creates a random Rare Joker, sets money to $0

name: Sigil
effect: Converts all cards in hand to a single random suit

name: Ouija
effect: Converts all cards in hand to a single random rank, -1 hand size

name: Ectoplasm
effect: Add Negative to a random Joker, -1 hand size

name: Immolate
effect: Destroys 5 random cards in hand, gain $20

name: Ankh
effect: Creates a copy of a random Joker, destroys all other Jokers

name: Deja Vu
effect: Add a Red Seal to 1 selected card

name: Hex
effect: Add Polychrome to a random Joker, destroys all other Jokers

name: Trance
effect: Add a Blue Seal to 1 selected card

name: Medium
effect: Add a Purple Seal to 1 selected card

name: Cryptid
effect: Creates 2 exact copies of 1 selected card

name: The Soul
effect: Creates a Legendary Joker

name: Black Hole
effect: +1 level to every poker hand
